title: Riido Work Branch Gate
rules: Every code or documentation change must use the branchName returned by Riido task creation.
Namespaced helper branches such as codex/... or feature/... are rejected.
Whitespace in branch names is rejected.
The format gate proves Riido work-unit shape; the exact branchName source remains the Riido task response.

examples.reason: default branch is allowed for local checks

assertions: branch gate script is generated from this manifest
reader doc is generated from this manifest
accepted and rejected branch examples are executed as verification evidence
PR branch-name workflow calls the generated script
